_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide subject matter expertise to planning efforts with internal and external cyber operations partners.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, including commercial terms, roadmap alignment, dependency management, and exit strategy planning.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-020 (AI, cosine: 0.486), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.486). Shared vocabulary: [planning]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, efforts, expertise, external, internal, matter] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.869, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Provide subject matter expertise to planning efforts with internal and external" and "Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 ≈ STS 0.486 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [planning] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [planning]. DCWF-only: [cyber, efforts, expertise, external, internal, matter]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit].
